Introduction: Oh no! A human! $6#$e#Wait, are you the one who tends to the land near the lake? $7#$b#I think I can trust you.. $7#$b#I'm Marigold, what's your name? $u#$b#@ huh? I'll try and remember that! $h
divorced: @.. Why are you here? $7#$b#Can't you just leave me alone? $s#
breakUp: These flowers.. They're dead.. $s#b#Wait.. Is this a human custom? $7#$b#You're breaking up with me? $s#b#I thought we had something special.. $s#b#I can't speak to anymore right now. $s
GreenRain: It's green! $7#$b#The frogs love it, but I'm not so sure.. $7
GreenRain_2: Green again! $7#$b#I guess it's slightly less scary this year.. $7
GreenRainFinished: I'm glad the green stopped.. $b#So strange.. $7
dating_{{ModId}}_Marigold: These flowers are beautiful! $u#$b#Oh! You want to be together? $l#$b#Yes! Let's do it! $l
{{ModId}}_Marigold_Engaged: This is pretty! $h#$b#Wait, it means marriage? $7#$b#Of course I'll marry you! $u
Mon: A fresh week! $b#Do you have any plans? $h$b#Me? I'm going to check on the slimes and see how they're getting on!
Tue: My frogs told me you're kind#$7#$b#So I think I can trust you
Wed: What are you growing right now? $b#Any flowers?
Thu: Oh you're back. $b#Do you visit all the magical creatures around town?
Fri: Have you noticed that strange woman that hangs out near the woods on Fridays? $7#$b#I always feel a magical aura emitting from her.
Sun: Have you seen that tower in the forest? $7#$b#A wizard? $6#$b#No wonder I feel such a magical aura over there.
Mon2: Humans are so fascinating.. $7#$b#The way you care for your young with outside help.. $7#$b#Fairies don't learn from anyone other than their parents.
Tue2: I was thinking about Old Master Cannoli today. $b#My mother always believed in the good of people. $b#I think he helped her to believe. $h
Wed2: One of my favourite places is a village called Everglade. $h#$b#I don't often go because it's such a long flight. $8
Fri2: I've been watching people from afar for a while now.. $7#$b#Your customs are fascinating.
Sat2: I think I might head to the forest today to look for honey. $h
Sun2: Frances was telling me the funniest story! $9#$b#You know Frances! The orange frog? $9
Mon4: The green animals that live in near Cannoli's statue are so strange.. $7
Tue4: Have you met the frogs, Petal, Leaf, Frances and Little Chub? $h#$b#I guess you can't talk to them huh? $7
Wed4: I've been collecting materials for my paint! $b#Maybe one day I can paint something for you! $h
Thu4: I was thinking about humans again today.. $8#$b#I think there's so much I don't understand about your kind still.
Fri4: I'm struggling with new ideas to paint.. $8#$b#Maybe I should go on a flight for inspiration.
Sat4: La la la la $u#$b#Oh @! $6#$b#Sorry I didn't see you! I was just singing to the butterflies!
Sun4: I spoke to the magical woman with the pig today $b#She tried to buy my dust $a#I don't trust her $8
Mon6: What's the latest gossip in town? $7#$b#Just because I'm scared of humans doesn't mean I'm not curious.. $8
Tue6: Fairy magic? $u#$b#I mainly use my magic for keeping my butterfly and frog friends alive. $u#$b#I know everything is supposed to live and die in a cycle, but they're my friends.
Wed6: Will you tell me about the animals on your farm? $7
Thu6: Sometimes I forget that you don't really have any magic. $b#At least, humans don't naturally.
Fri6: Fairies love sugar $h#$b#In case you were wondering $9
Sat6: Cannoli's statue was looking a bit grungy, so I cleaned it up this morning! $9
Sun6: Ever wonder why Little Chub is called Little Chub? $b#It was a childhood nickname that stuck after he ate an entire swarm! $6
Mon8: My mother used to tell me stories about human eating habits. $7#$b#Is it true you eat some rocks? $6#$b#I think one's called 'salt'?$6
Tue8: Have you met the shadow man in the sewers, Krobus? $b#Shadow people and fairies have always lived in harmony together $h
Wed8: I think all the humans in your town can be trusted. $7#$b#Except for the man in the tower.. He seems like he collects magic. $7
Thu8: The frogs have names, but the butterflies don't. $b#Names just aren't a part of their culture.
Fri8: It's the town dance night right? $7#$b#I think I'll join tonight!
Sat8: @ you're my closest friend! $9#$b#Don't tell the frogs.. $7
Sun8: Krobus and I have been talking about how we can both get more comfortable around humans.
Mon10: I feel more comfortable around humans now, I want to thank you for that @!
Tue10: @, you're really special to me. $u#$b#I'm glad you keep visiting me. $9
Thu10: @, my butterflies are really excited about us and what we can become! $l#$b#
Fri10: You deserve to relax this weekend! $h#$b#Here I hope this speeds some of your tasks up![(0)872]
Sat10: Maybe we should go on a date soon? $l#$b#I'll think of something!
Sun10: I was flying last night and I found this on the ground, I want to you to have it![(0)64]
spring_1: I just love Spring! $b#It's when the flowers really bloom it's so beautiful! $u
spring_Mon2: Have you seen all the flowers blooming? $u
spring_Mon4: Did you know honey tastes different depending on what flowers the bees have access to? $9
spring_Mon6: I found out that some humans eat frogs! $s#$b#Please don't eay my friends9! $s
spring_Tue4: My butterflies are appreciating the warmer weather! $u
spring_Tue6: Petal, one of my frogs, told me the funniest joke! $9#$b#Why are frogs so happy? $h#$b#They eat whatever bugs them! $9
spring_Tue8: Can you smell the nectar in the air? $u#$b#The bees must be hard at work! $u
spring_Wed2: I think I'll do some reading today. $b#Do you read much @?
spring_Wed10: I'm excited to see what'll happen today! $h#$b#Every day just feels knew and exciting now I'm with you! $l
spring_Thu2: @, are you having a good day?h
spring_Thu10: One of my butterflies brought my this! $u#$b#I want you to have it! [(0)421 (0)595 (0)18]$u
spring_Fri2: I hear your kind like to dance this time of the week? $9#$b#Me? $7#I dance every day of the week! $9
spring_Fri8: It's been ages since I flew to a fairy village.. $b#I should really go and get some more painting supplies.
spring_Sun: That magic pig woman is back..$7
spring_Sun10: I love this time of year! $h#$b#The flowers are almost as beautiful as you.. $l
summer_1: Summer is here! $h#$b#It's nice not needing to use my fire anymore.
summer_Mon: Did you know Summer is when the butterflies are most active? $u
summer_Mon4: Sometimes it's easier to travel in my smaller form $7#$b#I actually have more magic in that form $u
summer_Mon10: I think I'll go to the beach this week! $h
summer_Tue6: I got a letter from my friend in Everglade today, they're thinking of opening up a gallery! $h#$b#Apparently they'd love one of my paintings! $9
summer_Wed8: I'm looking forward to soaking my wings in the ocean later! $9
summer_Wed10: The beach sand feels a lot like my fairy dust $h
summer_Fri4: It's so lovely and warm! $b#The butterflies love it! $u
summer_Fri10: It's so nice to be able to go to the beach whenever I want without worrying about people seeing me. $h
summer_Sat8: I thought I would go to the local bar tonight $7#$b#I need to get more comfortable around humans $7
summer_Sat10: I was speaking to Krobus last night, he told me some interesting things about you.. $7
fall_1: Happy fall! $b#I know it's spooky season, but I prefer to think of it as cosy season! $h
fall_Mon: Are you growing any fairy roses? $h#$b#I might just have to give you a night time visit soon. $9
fall_Mon2: Even though I don't speak to humans, I still have lots of friends in the animals. $h
fall_Tue: It's blackberry season! $h#$b#It's such a great time of year to collect them!
fall_Tue8: Have you met the bear who lives around here? $7
fall_Wed4: Don't you think the leaves are just so beautiful this time of year? $h
fall_Thu4: Have you met the mouse in the forest? $b#He's a good friend of mine. $h
fall_Thu10: I think there are other fairies in the valley.. $7#$b#I haven't had the chance to meet any though.. $b#Probably because I'm such a homebody.
fall_Fri4: Eventually I'd love to have my own stall at the Everglade market.
fall_Sat10: I think I drank too much mead last night.. $7
fall_Sun6: My butterflies have started laying their eggs. $b#Sadly I can't keep them all around or I wouldn't be able to move, but every year I send them out into the world. $h
winter_1: Brrr $7#$b#It's too cold, I can't feel my wings. $7
winter_Tue4: Have you made a snowman? $h#$b#There's so much snow on the ground, it's really the best time to do it! $h
winter_Wed2: There are no flowers out this time of year. $8
winter_Wed4: Now it's so gold, I might go to Everglade for a warm night in their inn. $h
winter_Thu6: Normally at this time of year it would be too cold for my friends $7#$b#But I've used my magic to stop that from happening.
winter_Fri6: I'm glad I don't have to leave the house today. $h#$b#I just want to stay where it's warm.
winter_Fri8: It's Friday again! $b#The week just flew by!
winter_Sat8: My father always loved the winter $b#He always said the snow gives you a blank slate to start fresh.
winter_Sat10: It's cold out there! $7#$b#Take this to warm up! [(0)395]$h
winter_Sun8: One day I'd like to take you to Everglade. $h#$b#They don't really allow humans, so we might need to disguise you..
spring_12: What's up with all the eggs? $7#$b#I saw that strange old man putting them in bushes.. $7
spring_23: Doesn't the town celebrate the flowers tomorrow? $h#$b#I'll be celebrating with you! $h
summer_10: I hear you human folks make soup tomorrow? $7#$b#Here this is my favourite soup ingredient. Feel free to use it![(0)22 (0)591 (0)595] $h
summer_27: I'm resting my wings today so I can watch the jellies from overhead tomorrow.
fall_15: Good luck tomorrow! $h#$b#It's the competition for the best things collected right? $h
fall_26: Isn't tomorrow the scary day? $7#$b#I'll be staying at home where it's safe!
winter_7: It's been very loud in the forest today. $7#$b#I think someone is making holes in the ice? $7
winter_24: Is tomorrow the gift day? $b#I know I'm not a human, but I got you this.[(0)340]
